data.title: AD Info

tools.title: List Users
tools.description: Query and list Active Directory user accounts with customizable fields and filters.

fields.title: Search Base (OU)
fields.caption: Distinguished name of the OU to search (e.g., OU=Staff,DC=contoso,DC=com). Leave empty for entire domain.

fields.title: Search Scope
fields.value: Subtree — Search entire subtree [subtree], OneLevel — Direct children only [onelevel], Base — Base object only [base]
fields.caption: How deep to search within the search base.

fields.title: Name Filter
fields.caption: Wildcard filter for Name (e.g., *admin*, IT-*). Leave empty for all.

fields.title: Enabled Only
fields.caption: Only return enabled user accounts.

fields.title: Field Set
fields.value: Essential — Core fields (4 columns) [essential], Standard — Common fields (8 columns) [standard], Extended — Detailed fields (14 columns) [extended], All — Every available field [all]
fields.caption: Controls which columns are displayed.

fields.title: Sort By
fields.caption: Sort results by this property.

fields.title: Sort Order
fields.caption: Sort direction.

fields.title: Max Results
fields.caption: Maximum number of objects to return (1-10000).

fields.title: Export to File
fields.caption: Save results to a file for download or downstream workflows.

fields.title: Export Format
fields.caption: Format for the exported file.

fields.title: Export File Name
fields.caption: Name of the export file (extension added automatically).

tools.title: List Computers
tools.description: Query and list Active Directory computer accounts.

fields.title: Search Base (OU)
fields.caption: Distinguished name of the OU to search. Leave empty for entire domain.

fields.title: Search Scope
fields.value: Subtree — Search entire subtree [subtree], OneLevel — Direct children only [onelevel], Base — Base object only [base]
fields.caption: How deep to search within the search base.

fields.title: Name Filter
fields.caption: Wildcard filter for Name (e.g., SRV-*, DC-*). Leave empty for all.

fields.title: Enabled Only
fields.caption: Only return enabled computer accounts.

fields.title: Field Set
fields.value: Essential — Core fields (4 columns) [essential], Standard — Common fields (7 columns) [standard], Extended — Detailed fields (12 columns) [extended], All — Every available field [all]
fields.caption: Controls which columns are displayed.

fields.title: Sort By
fields.caption: Sort results by this property.

fields.title: Sort Order
fields.caption: Sort direction.

fields.title: Max Results
fields.caption: Maximum number of objects to return (1-10000).

fields.caption: Save results to a file for download or downstream workflows.

tools.title: Stale Accounts
tools.description: Find user and/or computer accounts with no logon activity in a specified number of days.

fields.title: Stale Days
fields.caption: Number of days without logon to consider an account stale.

fields.title: Object Type
fields.value: Users only [users], Computers only [computers], Both users and computers [both]
fields.caption: Type of accounts to check.

fields.caption: Distinguished name of the OU to search. Leave empty for entire domain.

fields.caption: Save results to a file for download or downstream workflows.

fields.title: Export Format
fields.caption: Format for the exported file.

fields.title: Export File Name
fields.caption: Name of the export file (extension added automatically).

tools.title: Domain Info
tools.description: Display domain/forest details, FSMO roles, and domain controllers.

tools.title: LDAP Query
tools.description: Run a custom LDAP filter query against Active Directory.

fields.title: LDAP Filter
fields.caption: LDAP filter expression (e.g., (&(objectClass=user)(department=IT))).

fields.title: Properties
fields.caption: Comma-separated list of AD properties to return.

fields.title: Search Base (OU)
fields.caption: Distinguished name of the OU to search. Leave empty for entire domain.

fields.title: Max Results
fields.caption: Maximum number of objects to return (1-10000).

tools.title: Compare OUs
tools.description: Compare objects between two Organizational Units and show differences.

fields.title: OU 1
fields.caption: Distinguished name of the first OU (e.g., OU=Sales,DC=contoso,DC=com).

fields.title: OU 2
fields.caption: Distinguished name of the second OU.

fields.title: Object Type
fields.caption: Type of objects to compare between the two OUs.

tools.title: Recent Changes
tools.description: Find AD objects created or modified within a specified number of days — an audit trail for recent activity.
